calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Canvas Infotech, Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Continued To Jun-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CANVAS INFOTECH, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter CONTINUED to June 1, 2018 per the request of the moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)
